beats.full_text: If a craving before the reason is familiar, this craving pattern needs a better reset.
beats.ssot_text: If a craving before the reason is familiar, this craving pattern needs a better reset.

beats.full_text: Trying to outrun addiction usually makes the loop more expensive. More secrecy, more bargaining with yourself. And less distance from the next craving.
beats.ssot_text: Trying to outrun addiction usually makes the loop more expensive: more secrecy, more bargaining with yourself, and less distance from the next craving.

secrecy, more bargaining
beats.speakable_text: Trying to outrun addiction usually makes the loop more expensive. More secrecy, more bargaining with yourself. And less distance from the next craving.

beats.full_text: The craving cycle often persists because the brain has learned a fast, reliable way to change how a hard moment feels. Pushing harder can look like progress while the underlying pattern stays the same.
beats.ssot_text: The craving cycle often persists because the brain has learned a fast, reliable way to change how a hard moment feels. Pushing harder can look like progress while the underlying pattern stays the same.

persists because the brain

reliable way to change how
beats.speakable_text: The craving cycle often persists because the brain has learned a fast, reliable way to change how a hard moment feels. Pushing harder can look like progress while the underlying pattern stays the same.

beats.full_text: Try this. Name the craving out loud, set a ten-minute delay. And do one different action in that window. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.
beats.ssot_text: Try this: name the craving out loud, set a ten-minute delay, and do one different action in that window. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.speakable_text: Try this. Name the craving out loud, set a ten-minute delay. And do one different action in that window. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

beats.full_text: Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. A craving is a wave with a shape and a ceiling, not a command.
beats.ssot_text: Bookmark the pattern: signal, reset, next action. A craving is a wave with a shape and a ceiling, not a command.
